title: clinopodium bolivianum subsp. diffusum
intro: Clinopodium bolivianum subsp. diffusum, also known as Bolivian clinopodium or Bolivian wild bergamot, is a plant species in the mint family Lamiaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and pain, and supporting the immune system. Clinopodium bolivianum subsp. diffusum can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a versatile addition to natural health remedies.
